item.title: New API endpoint: /responses
item.description: A new unified Responses API is now generally available.

item.title: Blog post: Building agents with the Responses API
item.description: A deep dive into agent patterns.

item.title: Deprecation: gpt-3.5-turbo-0301
item.description: gpt-3.5-turbo-0301 will be removed on June 13.
